---
title: "Brenna Rothman"
image: "brenna.jpeg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/brenna-rothman-aa35b720b/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/brenrothman"
  - label: Email
    url: "brenroth@uw.edu"
  - label: Instagram
    url: "https://www.instagram.com/barnacle.brenna/?igsh=NTc4MTIwNjQ2YQ%3D%3D&utm_source=qr#"
output:
  postcards::solana
---
## Bio

Born and raised in the Salish Sea, my ultimate goal has always been to maintain the healthy marine ecosystems that gave me life as a scientist. My research interests lie at the intersect of geospatial science and nearshore community ecology. Currently, I am a graduate student in the Marine Landscape Ecology Lab at the University of Washington - School of Aquatic and Fishery Sciences. 

## Education 

**University of Washington** | Seattle, WA

M.S. in Aquatic and Fishery Sciences | September 2024 - Current

**Oregon State University** | Corvallis, OR

B.S. in Biology | September 2019 - December 2022

## Experience

**Partnership for Interscholastic Studies of Coastal Oceans** |
Faculty Research Assistant | November 2023 - August 2024

**Partnership for Interscholastic Studies of Coastal Oceans** |
Biological Science Technician | June 2023 - October 2023

**Oregon State University** |
Undergraduate Research Fellow |  June 2022 - November 2022
